key-partners.title: Key Partners
key-partners.prompt: Who helps you deliver this business model?

key-activities.title: Key Activities
key-activities.prompt: What does your business do every day to deliver the value proposition?

key-resources.title: Key Resources
key-resources.prompt: What strategic assets do you absolutely need?

value-propositions.title: Value Propositions
value-propositions.prompt: What value do you deliver to which customer?
examples: Cut bookkeeping time from 5h to 30min per week

customer-relationships.title: Customer Relationships
customer-relationships.prompt: How does each segment expect you to engage?

customer-segments.title: Customer Segments
customer-segments.prompt: For whom are you creating value?

cost-structure.title: Cost Structure
cost-structure.prompt: What does running this business cost?

revenue-streams.title: Revenue Streams
revenue-streams.prompt: What are customers willing to pay for?
